stories.title: Move docs app into apps/docs as a unit
acceptanceCriteria: apps/docs/ contains app/, content/, components/, lib/, source.config.ts, next.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs, proxy.ts, tsconfig.json, README.md (moved, not copied)
Repo root no longer contains app/, content/, components/, lib/, source.config.ts, next.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs, proxy.ts
apps/docs/tsconfig.json keeps aliases @/* -> ./* and collections/* -> ./.source/* unchanged

stories.title: apps/docs/package.json is the docs workspace package
acceptanceCriteria: apps/docs/package.json has name 'docs' and private true

stories.title: Root package.json becomes private workspace root
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json has private:true and workspaces:["apps/*","packages/*"]
Root has no app runtime dependencies (moved to apps/docs)
Root has delegating scripts: dev (bun --filter docs dev), docs:build (bun --filter docs build), and a build script

stories.title: Workspace installs and docs build green
acceptanceCriteria: bun install at root completes with a single hoisted root node_modules + bun.lock
bun --filter docs build (or cd apps/docs && bun run build) builds docs site green with no broken imports; @/* and collections/* resolve from apps/docs
.gitignore remains valid for the new layout (node_modules, .next, .source, *.tsbuildinfo, next-env.d.ts match by basename)
